content.en:
"This piece of golden-veined purple wood can be used once by a supreme!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The golden-veined purple Chenmu is also an incomparably precious treasure in the wasteland, very rare, Ye Tian really didn't find the golden-veined purple Chenmu at the beginning, and those lower clans have no chance to obtain the golden-veined Zichenmu at all.

This piece of golden-veined purple wood was found by Ye Tian from the martial arts equipment after killing the desolate demon martial arts.

This golden-veined purple wood alone was enough to make a supreme pay a huge price, because it was hope.

If a supreme preserved a trace of his soul in the golden-veined purple wood, even if he died in battle, a trace of his soul could be preserved, and there was still hope for resurrection, but it was only at a great cost.

But no matter how big the price is, it is still hope, and it is countless times better than falling directly.

"The Wasteland has Zichenmu, although I killed Wu Zhan and Jian Gu at the beginning, if the creator of the Desolate Demon Clan is willing to pay some price, I can still resurrect them. Once Jian Gu is resurrected, the matter of my entry into the Deserted Tower will be exposed. However, the people of the Wasteland don't dare to chase them out, and I don't need to worry!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This piece of golden-veined purple wood, he plans to keep it for the time being, maybe it will be of great use in the future.

Immediately, he put away this piece of golden-veined purple wood and kept it in the Chaos Ancient Realm.

After some more time, Ye Tian received a notice from the Divine Blade Alliance, allowing him to go to the Battle Blade Realm to cultivate in the near future.

The Blade Blade Realm was at the headquarters of the Divine Blade Alliance, so Ye Tian came to the headquarters of the Divine Blade Alliance again on this day.

Under the guidance of the relevant personnel of the Divine Blade Alliance Headquarters, Ye Tian came to the Battle Blade Temple.

The Blade Shrine is the storage place of the Blade Realm, and it is also the entrance, and only through the Blade Shrine can you enter the Blade Realm.

At the gate of the Battle Blade Temple, Ye Tian saw some acquaintances, all of whom were galaxy-level and galaxy-level who had received the task of the Wasteland, and they had also completed the task and could enter the Blade Realm to cultivate.

Everyone was waiting at the gate of the Blade Temple, and after a while, they were all sent into the Blade Realm.

Without letting Ye Tian and the others wait long, a master of the Divine Blade Alliance appeared.

This Lord is called the Heaven-Shaking Master, and he is responsible for opening the Blade Realm and the related order this time.

"Wait a while, the Blade Blade Realm will open, you will enter one by one, and when you enter, don't release murderous aura and resist the Blade Blade Realm. After all, the Blade Blade Realm is the strongest treasure, even if no one pushes the Blade Realm, with the instinctive attack aura of the Blade Blade Realm, it is enough to annihilate you. The Lord of the Heavens reminded.

"We understand!"

The crowd responded.

Soon, the Heaven-Shaking Juggernaut opened the Blade Realm.

Everyone entered the Temple of Warblades, and saw a vortex in the Temple of Warblades.

This vortex is the entrance to the Blade Realm.

Whew!!

One by one, everyone flew into the Blade Blade Realm, very orderly.

Ye Tian also then entered the Battle Blade Knife Realm.

As soon as he entered the Blade Knife Realm, Ye Tian felt the difference between this piece of heaven and earth.

In the outside world, although Ye Tian could feel the existence of the Law of the Sword, it was far from being clear at this moment.

In the world of blades and blades, the law of the sword is everywhere, and even the origin of the sword can be seen everywhere.

Moreover, Ye Tian was astonished to find that in the Blade Sword Realm, he could even breed a new law of swords.

In other words, the law of the sword here is not available in the outside world, and it is the law of the sword that belongs exclusively to the blade knife world.

This is the same as Ye Tian condensed the origin of his own sword and created his own law of the sword.

In an instant, Ye Tian was attracted by the new sword law of the Battle Blade Sword Realm.

Although the other people's sword path realm was far inferior to Ye Tian, in the battle blade sword realm, the speed at which they comprehended the sword path was far greater than before.

As you can imagine, each of them has made rapid progress in the Warblade Blade Realm.

Somewhere in the Blade Blade Realm.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, closed his eyes, and carefully comprehended the law of the sword bred by the Battle Blade Knife Realm.

Time has passed year after year!

One by one, the time for the others was up, and they were removed by the Blade Blade Realm.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, could cultivate in the Blade Blade Realm for 76 years.

Gradually, only Ye Tian was left in the Blade Knife Realm.

In the blink of an eye, twenty years have passed!

On this day, Ye Tian suddenly woke up.

"Although I have created the law of the knife and condensed the origin of the sword, the origin of my knife is not complete, and the origin of my knife only contains the law of the knife and the perception of the knife that I created. But in fact, the origin of the sword is that it can constantly give birth to new laws of the sword, and those new laws of the sword can be something that I have not created. The Dao of the Sword is infinite, and I should let the Origin of the Dao give birth to a new Law of the Dao by itself, so that my Dao Realm can break through the limitations and step into a new realm. "

After comprehending this, Ye Tian completely changed his cultivation thinking.

He let the essence of the knife in his body come from the line and create a new law of the knife on his own.

In this way, Ye Tian's progress was getting faster and faster, reaching an incredible point.

On this day, it was the 50th year that Ye Tian had entered the Battle Blade Knife Realm.

Ye Tian has a new insight!

He began to perfect the Sky Moon Knife!

Prior to this, his Heavenly Moon Knife had already reached a half-step to a high-level sword path peer, and he was only one step away from reaching a high-level sword path mastery.

Now, he was ready to perfect the Tianyue Sword to the realm of the highest level of sword dao.

The Supreme Dao Peer is considered the highest level of the Knife Dao Peer, and among the Dominant-level Sword Dao powerhouses, there are even many people who have not created the Supreme Knife Dao Peerless.

And Ye Tian is only at the peak of the galaxy level now, and he is about to create a supreme-level sword path mastery, once it is transmitted, it will inevitably shake the entire universe.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian continued to try to perfect the Tianyue Sword, and the Battle Blade Knife Realm became his testing ground.

Anyway, he was the only one in the Blade Blade Realm now, and the space here was extremely solid, no matter how much he tossed, he couldn't damage a supreme treasure.

Therefore, he was extremely relieved to try to perfect his Tianyue Knife!

In the blink of an eye, another decade has passed.

......

"Sky Moon Knife!"

A round of sword light swept through the air, and the sword light was even mixed with the power of the Chaos Dao, the power of this knife was extremely terrifying, and even the space here left a spatial imprint.

A spatial imprint was created in the internal space of the Xeon Arcana, which was enough to see the terrifying strength of the power of this move.

"It's finally perfected, my Tianyue Sword has finally reached the level of the Supreme Sword Dao Peerless, but it is still far from the most rebellious Supreme Knife Dao Peerless Sect. For example, in the Divine Blade Alliance, his achievements in the Dao of Knives far surpass mine!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

There was still some time left, Ye Tian continued to comprehend, striving to improve the Tianyue Knife, at least to stabilize the Tianyue Knife to the realm of advanced sword Dao peerlessness.

Sixteen years have passed in a flash.

On this day, Ye Tian came out of the Blade Knife Realm!
